Bob Blackman CBE MP Serving the people of Harrow East I'm Bob Blackman and I've been elected to be your MP for Harrow East since 2010. It's a great honour to represent such an amazing and diverse community. I'm here to help, regardless of how you voted, so please get in touch. CLICK HERE to find ways for you to get involved and have your say! Lifts at Stanmore Station! Edgware Towers APPROVED by Labour Bob's Residents' Survey 2025 Bob Blackman calls for Labour to reintroduce the universal Winter Fuel Payments Changes to Employer National Insurance Contributions GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council Bob's #EndKnifeCrime Campaign Register to Vote, or need a Postal Vote? Let us know what you can do to help Save Harrow Police Station! Latest News & Speeches Bob Blackman on Pro-Palestine Hate Marches We all mourn the victims of the Bondi Beach terror attack. Hate marches… Bob Blackman on Northen Ireland Bob raised his concerns about the Govt's plans to replace the Legacy Act. … Bob Blackman on Animal Testing Bob called on the Govt to phase out animal testing in scientific… Read all news stories INVESTMENT: £22.6 million upgrade to Northwick Park Hospital I am delighted that London North West University Healthcare NHS Trust is receiving £22.62 million which will be used for a new ward with 32 beds at Northwick Park Hospital. This comes after I successfully pressed the Government for earlier support to improve Northwick Park's Accident & Emergency Department. CLICK HERE to find out more. pages.text_excerpt: About Bob Blackman | Bob Blackman Skip to main content Main navigation About Bob & Harrow East News & Speeches Subscribe to Bob's e-Newsletter Contact Get Involved! About Bob Blackman Tweet Bob Blackman has been the Conservative Member of Parliament for Harrow East since the 2010 General Election. During this time Bob has held several roles in the Conservative party and in Parliament, including Secretary of the 1922 Committee since 2015, being a Member of the Conservative Party Board since 2019, Member of 3 Select Committees, a Member of over 72 All-Party Parliamentary Groups (APPGs) and changed the law twice: first with his Homelessness Reduction Act 2017 and recently with his Supported Housing (Regulatory Oversight) Act 2023. Bob was awarded a C.B.E in The King's Birthday Honours List 2023 for his 37 years of continuous political and public service. In 1992, Bob contested the constituency of Brent South as the Conservative Prospective Parliamentary Candidate and produced one of the best results in London without being elected! In 1997, Bob contested Bedford & Kempston, producing the best result in Bedfordshire & Hertfordshire for the Conservatives again without actually winning! Bob also fought Brent North in 2005, producing a 7.1% swing in favour of the Conservatives. Before Parliament, Bob worked for BT Prior to being elected to Parliament, Bob was employed by British Telecom in various sales and management positions before becoming a sales tutor at the BT Training College. He was Regulatory Compliance Manager for BT from 1998 to 2010. Bob has also been employed in a variety of sales assignments for Unisys/Burroughs Machines before joining BT. Bob is married to Nicola Blackman - who is now a Harrow Councillor in Edgware, and lives in Wembley, where he has resided for most of his life. He has been a keen football fan since an early age and passionately supports Tottenham Hotspur, for whom he holds a season ticket for both home and away games. Bob was President of Liverpool University Guild of Undergraduates and Head Boy at Preston Manor High School, where he subsequently served as a School Governor. Outside of politics, Bob is an avid reader of thrillers, crime and mysteries, and a keen follower of rock music, with an extensive collection over the last 50 years. He also enjoys games of Bridge and Chess in his spare time and enjoys food of all varieties... especially curry. Greater London Assembly Member Bob was the Greater London Assembly member for Brent & Harrow for four years, after ousting the Labour Leader on the GLA in June 2004. He served as the Conservative Group Whip on the GLA and on the London Fire & Emergency Planning Authority, was a Member of the Budget Committee and the Deputy Chair of the Economic Development, Culture, Sport and Tourism Committee. Local Councillor & Leader Bob was a Councillor for the Preston Ward in Brent for 24 years, serving as leader of the Brent Conservatives from 1990 to 2010, before stepping down in order to stand as the Conservative candidate for Harrow East. Bob was the Deputy Leader of Brent Council between 2006 and 2010 and, during this time, presided over the budget of Brent Council, having previously served as the Leader of Brent Council between 1991 and 1996, where he was credited for leading the dramatic reduction in local taxes and major service improvements of that era. News Bob Blackman on Pro-Palestine Hate Marches Thursday, 18 December, 2025 We all mourn the victims of the Bondi Beach terror attack. Hate marches calling for a global intifada have led to this attack on Jewish people The Met have said these chants will now be an arrestable offence. I welcome this, but ask what will happen elsewhere across the country Follow Bob online: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bobblackmanofficial Instagram: https://www.instagram.com ... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Animal Testing 18th December 2025 Bob called on the Govt to phase out animal testing in scientific laboratories and replace these cruel practices by effective alternatives wherever possible... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Nigeria 18th December 2025 We have all seen the shocking scenes in Nigeria. The UK has invested heavily in girls’ education there, yet they face intimidation and coercion from Islamist... I asked if the Govt will listen... The Govt’s response? Scrapping jury trials. We need... I urged the Minister to ensure these dangerous chatbots are taken down and... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on the National Grid 18th November 2025 West London is being held back. Data centres, and much-needed housing can’t move forward because the National Grid can’t supply enough power. We can’t wait... pages.text_excerpt: Get Involved! | Bob Blackman Skip to main content Main navigation About Bob & Harrow East News & Speeches Subscribe to Bob's e-Newsletter Contact Get Involved! Get Involved! Tweet Here you can find many ways to get involved, including current surveys, polls, petitions and Bob's Harrow Residents' Survey, which you are welcome to fill in. Campaigns Save Harrow Police Station! Help us reverse Sadiq Khan and the Met Police's decision to close Harrow Police Station's front desk. Lifts at Stanmore Station! It has been a long 20 years trying to achieve this goal however we may finally be nearing the point where we have proper step-free access installed.Recently it was announced that Queensbury and Canons Park stations have made Transport for London’s shortlist to improve accessibility. Stop the Family Farm Tax Labour have broken their promise to British farmers with the Family Farm Tax. Labour's Family Farm Tax will stop farms being passed to the next generation Threatening our food security Risking jobs Leading to food prices ri Stop Labour's tax on bus travel Stop Labour's 50% bus fare hike. Labour's plans to raise bus fares from £2 to £3 mean hard-working people commuting every day will pay £520 a year more. Sign our petition to stop this. This petition will be presented to the Labour Party. Stop the grooming gangs It's time to get justice for victims. The only way to expose those who turned a blind eye to the grooming gangs is by holding a full inquiry, so sign our petition. Add your name and sign the petition to demand a full inquiry into the grooming gangs and those who turned a Save our local pubs Labour's War on Pubs Will Close Your Local Labour's pub tax hike will force landlords to raise prices or shut their doors for good. £1,000s extra in business rates per pub £800 extra per worker in National Insurance Higher Petition: Common sense immigration rules Our country is not a hotel, it is our home. Bob's Residents' Survey 2025 Every year I conduct a survey of residents so that I can act on your concerns, champion what matters to you and deliver what you want to see.Since being re-elected as your Member of Parliament, I have been busy delivering on the priorities you told me mattered: crime, schools, housing, the NHS, busi Changes to Employer National Insurance Contributions Labour announced several tax rises in the Autumn Budget, particularly the increase to employer National Insurance contributions (NICs). Bob Blackman calls for Labour to reintroduce the universal Winter Fuel Payments Bob Blackman CBE MP has launched a survey to hear the concerns of local residents on the Government's recent announcement to cut Winter Fuel Payments to pensioners. In response to the Governments proposals, the Conservative Party has submitted an Early Day Motion to challenge the government's decis Edgware Towers APPROVED by Labour Labour-run Barnet have APPROVED the Edgware TowersIgnoring the wishes of residents, businesses and local communities.Now more than ever, we need to step up our efforts. Bob's #EndKnifeCrime Campaign Over 1,000 Londoners have been killed in the capital since Sadiq Khan became Mayor. Knife crime is so bad in London that it has skewed the national average, despite knife crime falling elsewhere across the country. This cannot go on. Please complete Bob's Crime Survey to have your say on what our Register to Vote, or need a Postal Vote? If you would like details on registering to vote, or to request a postal vote, complete the form below. Let us know what you can do to help Winning is hard.That's why incredible volunteers like you make all the difference.Please let us know what you can do to help by completing the quick survey below. GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council The Conservatives took control of Harrow Council in May 2022. Bob is keen to hear your views on how you think it is going, what you would like to see in Harrow and other important topics! You can complete Bob's survey below to take part. See A

pages.text_excerpt: GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council | Bob Blackman Skip to main content Main navigation About Bob & Harrow East News & Speeches Subscribe to Bob's e-Newsletter Contact Get Involved! GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council Tweet The Conservatives took control of Harrow Council in May 2022. Bob is keen to hear your views on how you think it is going, what you would like to see in Harrow and other important topics! You can complete Bob's survey below to take part. Harrow Residents' Survey Current Survey In order to keep this survey representative: Your details Leave this field blank Are there any issues which need resolving in your local area? Are you aware of the improvements the new Conservative-run Harrow Council is making? Yes No Which of these local matters would you consider to be of most importance to you? (Tick all that apply) Treat our residents and businesses like valued customers and respond to them. Crack down on fly-tipping with improved street cleaning and free bulky waste collections. Introduction of one-hour free parking and expansion to Council-run car parks. Restrict tall buildings in our suburbs and protect the character of our borough. Tackle illegal HMOs and "beds in sheds" by increasing enforcement. Spending your money wisely with no more vanity projects. Which of the Government's five pledges are most important to you? Halve Inflation Grow the Economy Reduce Debt Cut NHS Waiting Lists Stop the Boats Are you in favour of the Mayor of London's ULEZ expansion to the whole of London (including Harrow)? Yes No (Please add my name to your petition against ULEZ) No (I do not wish for my name to be added to your petition against ULEZ) If you live in Harrow East, how well do you think Bob Blackman is doing as your MP? Extremely well Quite well Okay Not very well Badly No opinion Bob Blackman MP Your Local Voice for Harrow East Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Harrow East Promoted by Zak Wagman on behalf of Bob Blackman, both of HECA, 209 Headstone Lane, Harrow, HA2 6ND.
